metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4884
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1a: experimental design; to determine the specificities of G-protein Gβγ subunits for the SNARE complex upon activation of α2a-Adrenergic Receptor (ADRA2A), authors used synaptosomes collected from the brains of wild-type, α2aAR KO, and FLAG-α2a-Adrenergic Receptor mice and co-IP of SNAP25 and Gβγ.

Figure 3, 7: anti-SNAP25 pulldown yields Gγ7 (GNG7) and the relative amount thereof was affected by epinephrine stimulation to activate the α2a-Adrenergic Receptor.. Experimental description: result section: "To determine the specificities of Gβγ subunits for the SNARE complex upon activation of α2aAR, we used synaptosomes collected from the brains of wild-type (WT), α2aAR KO, and FLAG-α2aAR mice."

M&M:
"Epinephrine (catalog E4642), prazosin (catalog P7791), and propranolol (catalog P0884) were purchased from Sigma-Aldrich."

"For immunoprecipitations, rabbit anti-SNAP25 (Sigma-Aldrich, S9684) and rabbit ChromePure IgG (Jackson Immunoresearch, 011-030-003) were used."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
